## Workflow Submission Checklist

- [ ] My `.md` file is placed at the **root** of the repository
- [ ] The filename uses **kebab-case** (e.g. `my-workflow.md`)
- [ ] All required YAML frontmatter fields are filled in
- [ ] The workflow has been tested and runs successfully

---

## Workflow File Preview

> Paste the content of your `.md` file below so reviewers can check it.

```markdown
---
github_owner: ""
github_repo: ""
pegasus_version: ">= 5.0.0"
Topic: ""
license: "Apache License 2.0"
last_verified: "YYYY-MM-DD"
image: ""
name: ""
description: ""
---

# Title : <Workflow_Name>

## Description
A brief explanation of what your workflow does.

## File Description
* **generator.py:** Creates abstract workflow.
* **pegasus.properties:** Configurations.

## How to run?
```bash
python3 generator.py
```

## THE WORKFLOW VISUALISATION
```
